Yongbyon Nuclear Complex.name: Yongbyon Nuclear Complex
Yongbyon Nuclear Complex.note: 5 MWe reactor and radiochemical laboratory show continued operational signatures. Cooling water discharge and steam patterns consistent with ongoing plutonium reprocessing campaign.

Sinpo South Shipyard.name: Sinpo South Shipyard
Sinpo South Shipyard.note: Construction activity at submarine launch facility continues. Satellite imagery shows vessel assembly building modifications and pier-side equipment movement consistent with SLBM program development.

THAAD Site — Seongju County.name: THAAD Site — Seongju County
THAAD Site — Seongju County.note: THAAD battery remains operationally deployed. No changes to launcher configuration or radar positioning observed.

Sohae Satellite Launch Station.name: Sohae Satellite Launch Station
Sohae Satellite Launch Station.note: Launch pad infrastructure rebuilding completed. Engine test stand shows signs of recent activity. Facility restored after 2018 partial dismantlement.

Punggye-ri Nuclear Test Site.name: Punggye-ri Nuclear Test Site
Punggye-ri Nuclear Test Site.note: Tunnel 3 and Tunnel 4 portal areas show continued maintenance activity. Support infrastructure intact. Site assessed as test-ready if political decision is made.

Tumangang–Khasan (NK-Russia border).name: Tumangang–Khasan (NK-Russia border)
Tumangang–Khasan (NK-Russia border).note: Rail traffic across Friendship Bridge remains elevated since 2024. Freight movements consistent with military equipment and ammunition transfers under NK-Russia cooperation framework.

Sinuiju–Dandong (NK-China border).name: Sinuiju–Dandong (NK-China border)
Sinuiju–Dandong (NK-China border).note: Cross-border trade via Friendship Bridge showing gradual normalization. Truck traffic volumes recovering toward pre-COVID baseline levels. New customs infrastructure visible.

Rason SEZ.name: Rason SEZ
Rason SEZ.note: Port activity increased with Russian-flagged vessels. Rajin port infrastructure shows new construction consistent with expanded NK-Russia trade logistics.
